stack.unstorage: unstorage ^1.10.0 (peerDependency — the KV API this driver backs)

federation.membershipTodo: SDK (not an app). An unstorage `defineDriver()` driver that backs unstorage's KV API with a Solid pod over LDP: keys map to LDP resource paths under a base container, values are opaque KV blobs (text/json/binary), and getKeys reads ldp:contains container listings via @jeswr/fetch-rdf + @solid/object. Watch uses Solid Notifications WebSocketChannel2023 with graceful degradation. No federation membership of its own — it is storage glue.
